MV RIPLEY PRIDE 76,858 DWT BLT 2003 OPEN HUANGHUA, NCHINA AROUND 16 - 22 DEC
-/ Maisam
PLEASE PROPOSE SUITABLE CARGO FOR BELOW VESSEL
MV RIPLEY PRIDE 76,858 DWT BLT 2003 OPEN HUANGHUA, NCHINA AROUND 16 - 22 DEC
BOD: ABT 300 - 350 MTS VLSFO & AND ABT 40 - 50 MTS LSMGO
LAST CARGO: IRON ORE
PREFERENCE MIN 4 TO MAX 5 MONTHS WITH REDELY CHINA
TRY ANY
Vessel’s Description
MV RIPLEY PRIDE
IMO NO 9253832
TYPE: PANAMAX GLESS SELF TRIMMMING SDBC
CLASS: LRS & IRS
FLAG: INDIA
BUILT: 2003
DWMT: 76858 DWMT ON 14.126 SSW
GRT/NRT- 39966/25503
TPC: 66.77
LOA: 225M
BM: 32.26M
NUMBER OF HOLDS:7
GRAIN CAPA: 90475
AT SEA
BALLAST / LOADED ABT -12 KNOTS , VLSFO ABT-21.00 MT / 23.00 MT + LSMGO- ABT-0.1 MT
IN PORT
IDLE-VLSFO ABT-2.75 MT  + LSMGO ABT-0.1 MT
WORKING – VLSFO ABT-3.5MT  + LSMGO ABT-0.1 MT
ada
ABOVE APPLY WHEN NOT PERFORMING BALLAST OPERATIONS AND WHEN SPEED IS NOT RESTRICTED DUE TO PREVAILING CONDITIONS (EG.WHEN VSL TRADES HRA ZONES OR IN REGIONS WHERE IT IS CUSTOMARY TO SLOW DOWN ORDEVIATE FOR GUARDS, CORRIDOR ENTRIES, FOG, HEAVY TRAFFIC, FISHING BOAT ACTIVITY, NETS ETC) WHEN PERFORMING BALLAST OPERATIONS OR USING AUXILIARY BOILER ADD ABT)2 MTS IFO (OWRS CONFIRM VSL SPEED/CONSUMPTIONS WARRANTIED ARE ALL INCLUSIVE I.E. INCLUSIVE OF ALL MAIN AND ALL AUXILIARY ENGINES.
THE WORD "ABOUT" IN SPEED AND CONSUMPTION REFERS TO AN ALLOWANCE OF MINUS 0.5KNTS AND PLUS 5% ON BUNKER CONSUMPTION RESPECTIVELY, BOTH IN OWNERS FAVOR.
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION FIGURES ARE WARRANTED BASIS GOOD WEATHER DAY OF; NOON TO NOON OPEN SEA NAVIGATION, 24-HOUR DAILY EVALUATION ONLY THROUGH MASTER REPORTING, SUMMER ZONES, NO DECK/HATCH COVER CARGO, MAXIMUM BEAUFORT FORCE 4 AND/OR SWH 1.25 M, NO ADVERSE CURRENTS, NO ADVERSE SWELL.
IT IS EXPLICITLY UNDERSTOOD THAT, NOTWITHSTANDING ANYTHING TO THE CONTRARY HEREIN, NO SPEED OR CONSUMPTION WARRANTY APPLIES/NO PERFORMANCE EVALUATION WILL BE MADE IN A DAY: EXCEEDING BEAUFORT FORCE 4 OR SWH 1.25 M; OR ADVERSE CURRENTS; OR ADVERSE SWELL, OR SEA BUOY TO SEA BUOY, WHERE VOYAGES LESS THAN 48 HOURS AND/OR 24 HOURS AFTER COSP / PRIOR EOSP; OR CANAL NAVIGATION; OR NARROW/RESTRICTED/TIDAL AFFECTED WATERS AND DUE TO REASONS OF SAFETY, OR POOR VISIBILITY ETC. OR, PERIODS WHEN THE SPEED IS REDUCED DUE TO CHARTERERS’ INSTRUCTIONS.
POSITIVE CURRENT SHALL NOT BE APPLIED IN DIMINISHING VESSELS SPEED PERFORMANCE.
THE SPEED SO DESCRIBED IS ON AN AVERAGE BASIS THE ENTIRE CHARTER PERIOD, INCLUDING BALLAST/LADEN VOYAGES, 24HR DAILY EVALUATION ONLY, PROVIDED NO BOTTOM FOULING (ANCHORAGE/PORT/MANOEUVRING/APPROACHING) FOLLOWING VESSEL DELIVERY TO CHARTER (PORT(S) OR ANCHORAGE(S) OR SHIFTING(S) OF LESS THAN 24HRS TO BE EXCLUDED).
WHEN VESSEL SAILS ON ECO SPEED OR UNDER SLOW STEAMING, OWNER/MASTER HAVE THE RIGHTS TO RAISE RPM 2-3 HOURS PER DAY TO PREVENT DAMAGE TO THE MAIN ENGINE.
VESSEL HAS THE LIBERTY OF STEAMING AT SLOW SPEED OR STOP/BEING IDLE OR DEVIATE FOR THE PURPOSES OF BALLAST EXCHANGE IF REQUIRED AT CHARTERERS TIME/COST. COST OF BALLAST TREATMENT/EXCHANGE IF REQUIRED AND ANY LOSS OF SPEED/TIME TO BE FOR CHARTERERS ACCOUNT.
VESSEL CONSUMES ADDITIONAL VLSFO / MGO WHILE PERFORMING BALLAST EXCHANGE OPERATIONS AND/OR CLEANING OF VESSEL’S HOLDS.
VESSEL HAS THE LIBERTY TO BURN MGO WHEN ENTERING/LEAVING PORT, WHEN MANOEUVRING AND IN NARROW, SHALLOW OR CONGESTED WATERS, RIVERS, STRAITS, CANALS, WHEN BALLASTING/DEBALLASTING OR HEATING FUEL AND/OR ACCOMMODATION SPACES IN COLD WEATHER OR CLIMATES.
ADA
